title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-eip-allocations (beta)
text:
Example:
service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-eip-allocations: "eipalloc-01bcdef23bcdef456,eipalloc-def1234abc4567890"
Used on: Service
The cloud controller manager integration with AWS elastic load balancing configures
a load balancer based on this annotation. The value is a comma-separated list
of elastic IP address allocation IDs.
This annotation is only relevant for Services of
type: LoadBalancer
, where
the load balancer is an AWS Network Load Balancer.
